label: CU loop • escalate empty AX -> SoM to see and click a custom-drawn control
notes: Deterministic (scripted-model) vision-escalation case for the Electron / custom-drawn-UI shape: every actionable control is SoM-only (minTier: som), so a plain AX capture is EMPTY and the loop must climb ax->som (Screen Recording is granted in the scripted driver) before the Send button is visible and addressable. A successful scripted click on the SoM-gated button — flipping status to 'sent' — transitively proves the empty-AX->SoM escalation worked, with no live model.
